title: HYPERLOOP IMPROVED CONCEPT — v1.0 + v2.0 + v3.0
entry: Hyperloop Improved Concept - three-version analytical framework originated March 10, 2026. v1.0: five critical failure modes, six-thousand-year material science map, five scientific advancements. v2.0: CRP v7.0-BETA six-framework adversarial validation (Taleb, Pearl, Meadows, Shannon, Rawls, Bergson), 600mph recommended over 760mph. v3.0: Bio-Adaptive Pattern Mining Layer — six biological systems, five-filter translation firewall, four novel enhancements. Framework convergence: M-STRONG. Author: Sheldon K. Salmon. Analysis Engine: CRP v7.0-BETA · CRP v7.0-ALPHA (CEREBRO) · CRP v7.0-CHARLIE.
author: Sheldon K. Salmon
